---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest something new or an improvement to an existing feature
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A one-sentence description of the feature.

## Problem it solves

What problem does this feature solve? Who benefits from it?

## Proposed solution

How you think it could work. Keep it concrete — UI sketches, workflow descriptions, or code snippets are welcome.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered and why you ruled them out.

## Scope check

Please confirm this fits the Xell scope:

- [ ] This is related to SSH workflows, terminal, SFTP, or port forwarding
- [ ] This does not require cloud sync, accounts, or external services
- [ ] This does not introduce heavy external dependencies

Features outside scope (AI, Docker, cloud sync, teams) will be declined regardless of implementation quality. Check [CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md) before submitting.
